issues: compute_signal method indentation errors causing logic blocks to be incorrect
compute_signal uses 'pct_change()' on 'count' but spec requires 'weekly_growth_rate_ev_chargers' > 0.03 as entry and < 0.02 as exit; pct_change() without resampling may not reflect weekly growth
weeks_since_entry logic partially correct but increment happens only if weeks_since_entry > 0; initial entry sets weeks_since_entry=1 but no increment on subsequent weeks before exit
target_allocations uses allocation_per_signal=0.05 and max_total_exposure=0.2 is not enforced (no aggregation or max exposure check)
signal names RISK_ON/RISK_OFF/HOLD are acceptable but indentation errors in signal logic cause incorrect flow
adapter import and usage correct, uses fetch_openchargemap_counts and 'count' column as per adapter contract
